heading: Regulations and orders
label: 8315 Regulations and orders
text: The Secretary may promulgate such regulations, and issue such orders, as the Secretary determines necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle E (§§ 10401–10418) of title X of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of subtitle E to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 107–171116 Stat. 494section 8301 of this titleMay 13, 2002

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of the Secretary of Agriculture relating to agricultural import and entry inspection activities under this chapter to the Secretary of Homeland Security, and for treatment of related references, see sections 231, 551(d), 552(d), and 557 of Title 6, Domestic Security, and the Department of Homeland Security Reorganization Plan of , as modified, set out as a note under .November 25, 2002section 542 of Title 6
